notes: Added Player Connect Beta for LAN hosting, session discovery, joining by IP or invite code, live player markers, and chat.
Added host-controlled guest permissions for place, erase, and paint/replace, plus guest kicking, edit history, and automatic pre-session backups.
Added a full-screen searchable Minecraft-style inventory and hotbar block picker.
Added a persistent Clipboard Library for saving and reusing copied build pieces.
Improved multiplayer-safe editing, menus, camera input handling, and connection status.
